name: A family Over A Hot Oven
overview: A Kuwaiti series that takes place in a comedy setting, about the miser (Abu Saleh), his wife (Fatima), his daughter (Hayla), and his son (Saleh), arising between the mother of Fatima's mother and her husband Saleh many problems because of his sadness. While Hamdan lives with his sister Al-Ansabya, who is looking to marry anyone.

trailers.title: مسلسل عائلة فوق تنور ساخن الحلقة الأولى 1
